title: PointCast Internships 2026

program_lead.name: Wanda
program_lead.note: Original PointCast guide; no official affiliation with any outside media franchise.

operating_model.cadence: weekly work cycles, receipts, review, Friday publish
operating_model.terms_note: Formal terms, eligibility, compensation, academic credit, age requirements, and token/reward details are confirmed before anyone starts.

conduct_expectations: Use respectful language and keep channels focused on the work.
Do not publish private information, personal stories, photos, recordings, school details, or wallet details without explicit permission.
Do not represent PointCast, submit grant material, or announce rewards without review.
Youth participation requires appropriate permission, supervision, and age-appropriate task scope where applicable.

roles.title: Agent Wrangler
roles.mission: Design prompts, review agent outputs, turn rough runs into clean public notes, and help maintain machine-readable manifests.
tasks: Audit one agent workflow each week.
Ship one reusable prompt or checklist.

roles.title: Local Signal Scout
roles.mission: Bring a city, neighborhood, campus, market, venue, or local scene into PointCast as a tiny public channel.
tasks: Interview or observe one real community surface.

roles.title: Information Gatherer
roles.mission: Collect reliable sources, interview notes, screenshots, links, and observations so PointCast can make better decisions before publishing or building.
tasks: Flag privacy, uncertainty, and next questions.

roles.title: Participation Memory Keeper
roles.mission: Help participants record the moment their work became real: what they learned, what they contributed, and what someone else can now use.

roles.title: Token Trail Builder
roles.mission: Explore collection flows, minting options, wallets, rewards, and how tokens can document participation with responsibility and clarity.

roles.title: Nouns Interest Configurator
roles.mission: Help participants choose a Nouns path, stamp a local receipt, and send a reviewed interest note to PointCast.
tasks: Draft one clear message for review.

roles.title: Image Model Gardener
roles.mission: Curate datasets, run image prompts, compare model outputs, and prepare galleries or training notes for future image apps.

roles.title: Reality Layer Explorer
roles.mission: Prototype AR/VR concepts for rooms, tours, posters, local maps, 3D scenes, and spatial field trips.

roles.title: Play Lab Designer
roles.mission: Design structured game loops for Drum, races, rooms, Nouns, rewards, and learning surfaces.

roles.title: Soundtrack Cartographer
roles.mission: Build playlists, sonic identities, generative audio prompts, station formats, and audio rituals for rooms.

roles.title: Field Science Reporter
roles.mission: Turn ecology, weather, gardens, cities, sustainability, IoT, and field observations into practical public posts.
tasks: Propose a sensor or data feed.

roles.title: Grant Quest Analyst
roles.mission: Find grants, map eligibility, draft application sections, and convert strategy into machine-readable packets.

roles.title: Reward Desk Operator
roles.mission: Review task receipts, organize claim queues, spot abuse patterns, and make reward rules fair, transparent, and well-documented.

roles.title: Broadcast Editor
roles.mission: Write blocks, edit captions, package field notes, and make dense technical work readable by normal humans.

roles.title: Tiny Tools Engineer
roles.mission: Build small web tools, JSON endpoints, scrapers, visual prototypes, QA scripts, and focused useful utilities.
tasks: Add one data field or route.

regional_missions.focus: local media, sports, city rooms, creator commerce, campus nodes
art networks, public goods, protocol research, cultural archives
mobile-first tools, climate observation, music scenes, market maps
architecture, trade routes, spatial media, local language interfaces
education, developer communities, media workflows, image tooling
games, social platforms, collectibles, maker communities
remote collaboration, ecology, surf/coast culture, field science
Discords, Farcaster, GitHub, open-source rooms, agent habitats
